title: Can you delete a board column through graphql?
excerpt:
Is it possible to delete a board column through the api? 
We can create a column through mutation { create_column } but I have not been able to find a way to delete a column

posts.author: iateadonut (Donal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to delete a board column through the api?

We can create a column through mutation { create_column } but I have not been able to find a way to delete a column

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @iateadonut,

Currently, it is not possible to delete a column through the API. You can upvote the feature request here so as it moves up the ladder of priorities for the dev team

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @iateadonut,

I have to agree with @kolaai’s comment here I’m afraid it is not possible to delete a column via the API at this time. I do recommend giving your vote to the Feature Request referenced

-Alex

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
